svg.title: Reactor core — animated atom, LIN0304 agent runtime
svg.desc: Animated atom reactor core rendered in pure SVG SMIL: a pulsing multi-shell nucleus inside containment rings, three tilted electron orbits whose electrons swing to the front larger and brighter then dim behind the core, vented energy particles, and live telemetry for core temperature, spin and shell status. Ray Lin — agentic systems engineer, Taipei.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'DejaVu Sans Mono', 'Liberation Mono', monospace

svg.text: reactor-core --monitor atom-01 --live · the loop's power plant
